scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.clean-ports: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001,24678 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -ne 0 } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; exit 0"
scripts.dev: npm run clean-ports && concurrently "npm run ml" "npm run server" "npm run client"
